title: [Skyship, Arches]
description: Broad and dark metal arches line the area's bulkheads.  One such arch is built over a collapsed metal tunnel, while all others frame silver-white runic symbols painted upon the bulkheads.  Sealed wooden crates marked with similar runic symbols in paint and wax are scattered across the room.  Above, thick white ropes coated with ash-hued wax and deep crimson paint hang from the ceiling in tight tangles.
